steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both equations are equal to $y$, so set their right sides equal.
$$-10x+13=-12x+15$$
$$2x=2$$

steps.title: Find the ordered pair
steps.content:
Solve for $x$, then substitute into either equation.
$$x=1$$
$$y=-10(1)+13=3$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two equations gives the same intersection point, $(1,3)$. The answer is D.
